title: New Discovery in Dark Matter
description:
This is the most detailed map of dark matter we’ve ever made. It makes up 27% of our universe but we don’t really understand it because it’s INVISIBLE!

This shows the previous map we had made with the Hubble telescope in 2007 and the new map, made by Webb.

Clearer pictures of this mysterious matter help us understand it! For more optimistic science and tech stories subscribe!

#science #NASA #darkmatter #space #telescope
